answers: Smart home basics: connect devices via WiFi to control lights, locks, thermostat, cameras, and more from your phone.
Best devices to start: smart speaker (Alexa/Google), smart bulbs, smart plugs, video doorbell, and smart thermostat.
Setup tips: choose one ecosystem (Alexa/Google/Apple), ensure strong WiFi, start with one room, and expand gradually.
Smart home benefits: convenience, energy savings, security, accessibility for elderly/disabled, and cool factor.
